bondspot_turnover.detail: BondSpot SA venue daily turnover values

minfin_turnover.detail: Polish Ministry of Finance monthly per-series turnover, sheet "Obligacje(T-bonds)_outright". Publication lag up to ~2 months.

minfin_obligacje_hurtowe.detail: Polish Ministry of Finance auctions register and monthly outstanding amounts · latest DataTransakcji in Operacje sheet

minfin_coupon_schedules.detail: Polish Ministry of Finance coupon-schedule reference workbook

nbp_reference_rate.detail: NBP Monetary Policy Council reference-rate decisions

fed_gsw_curve.detail: Gurkaynak-Sack-Wright daily Svensson parameters for the US Treasury zero-coupon yield curve. Auto-refreshed daily.

ecb_aaa_curve.detail: European Central Bank daily Svensson parameters for the AAA-rated euro-area government bond yield curve. Auto-refreshed daily.

acm_term_premia.detail: Adrian-Crump-Moench affine TSM, weekly Friday closes
